author: Jiao Yingxing
description: Make plugin-heavy Obsidian vaults start smoother, especially on mobile. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jiao Yingxing
manifest.description: Make plugin-heavy vaults start smoother, especially on mobile.
manifest.name: A Loader

name: A Loader

releases.author: jiaoyingxing
releases.description:
### 中文

0.4.6 继续把启动设置往“少操作、少判断”收。现在你可以先把大多数已启用插件统一改成稍后加载，再只留下少数需要启动时加载的插件。

- 设置页顶部新增“全部稍后”，可一键把当前已启用插件设为稍后加载。
- 手机端排版调整为第二行左侧加载方式、右侧启停开关，插件多时更容易逐个调整。
- 插件信息展示更清楚：版本和作者合并展示，启动耗时显示记录次数、最近耗时和平均耗时。

### English

A Loader 0.4.6 keeps simplifying startup control. You can now move most enabled plugins to delayed loading in one step, then only keep a small set on startup.

- Adds a top-level `Delay all` action to move all currently enabled plugins to delayed loading.
- Improves the mobile layout: the second row now places the load mode on the left and the enable switch on the right.
- Makes plugin details easier to scan, with version and author shown together and startup timing shown as run count, latest time, and average time.

### Notes

- Existing installs can upgrade by replacing `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.
- The plugin ID stays `a-plugins`, so the manual install folder remains `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/a-plugins/`.
releases.name: A Loader 0.4.6

releases.author: jiaoyingxing
releases.description:
### 中文

0.4.5 主要修正了插件身份信息，解决 0.4.4 因插件 ID 不一致带来的审核和安装问题。

- `manifest.json` 的插件 ID 恢复为现有目录使用的 `a-plugins`。
- 手动安装目录同步恢复为 `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/a-plugins/`。
- 设置页里的启动耗时文案改得更直白，现在显示为“记录X次，平均Xms”。

### English

A Loader 0.4.5 fixes the plugin identity mismatch introduced in 0.4.4, so installation and community listing stay consistent again.

- The plugin ID in `manifest.json` is restored to `a-plugins`.
- The manual install folder is back to `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/a-plugins/`.
- Startup timing text in settings is now easier to read, showing recorded runs and the average time.

### Notes

- If you manually installed 0.4.4 in the `a-loader` folder, move the three release files into the `a-plugins` folder when upgrading.
- The display name remains `A Loader`.
releases.name: A Loader 0.4.5

releases.author: jiaoyingxing
releases.description:
A Loader 0.4.4 aligns the plugin machine identity with the public product identity.

Changes:
- Updates manifest id to a-loader.
- Updates the manual installation folder to <vault>/.obsidian/plugins/a-loader/.
- Keeps the display name as A Loader and the same lightweight startup management scope.

Install from this release by downloading main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css into the a-loader plugin folder.
releases.name: A Loader 0.4.4

releases.author: jiaoyingxing
releases.description:
## A Loader 0.4.3

This release fixes automated review blockers from the official plugin submission flow.

### Changes

- Renamed the display name from `A Plugins` to `A Loader`.
- Updated the manifest description so it no longer includes restricted wording.
- Updated `README.md` to be English-first, with Chinese documentation moved to `README-zh.md`.
- Fixed `versions.json` to use the official plugin-version to minimum-app-version mapping.
- Kept the plugin ID as `a-plugins`.

### Release assets

- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`
releases.name: A Loader 0.4.3

releases.author: jiaoyingxing
releases.description:
# A Plugins 0.4.2

This release aligns the public repository workflow and license language before the official store submission path.

## Changed

- Changed the repository license from MIT to a custom source-available license.
- Clarified that the source code is publicly available for review, but the project is not open source.
- Added a whitelist-based sync workflow for publishing from the development workspace to the public GitHub repository.
- Stopped tracking `main.js` in the public repository source tree; release builds should use GitHub Release assets.

## Note

The required installation assets remain available from GitHub Releases: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`.
releases.name: A Plugins 0.4.2

releases.author: jiaoyingxing
releases.description:
# A Plugins 0.4.1

This is a naming alignment release for the official store submission path.

## Changed

- Changed the plugin ID from `startup-optimizer` to `a-plugins`.
- Updated the manual installation folder to `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/a-plugins/`.
- Kept the display name as `A Plugins`.

## Note

Changing the plugin ID means Obsidian treats this as a different plugin folder from earlier `startup-optimizer` builds. This is intentional for the official store naming path.
releases.name: A Plugins 0.4.1

releases.author: jiaoyingxing
releases.description:
# A Plugins 0.4.0

This release prepares the plugin for an open-source official store path.

## Changed

- Renamed the public plugin name to **A Plugins**.
- Updated the public description to: "Make plugin-heavy Obsidian vaults start smoother, especially on mobile."
- Switched the project license to MIT.
- Prepared the repository direction for source code and release artifacts to live together on GitHub.

## Still The Same

- The plugin ID remains `startup-optimizer` to avoid resetting existing user data.
- The plugin still focuses on community plugin startup timing and enable / disable management.
- Internal Chinese UI continues to use the "启动优化器" wording where appropriate.
releases.name: A Plugins 0.4.0

releases.author: jiaoyingxing
releases.description:
# Startup Optimizer 启动优化器 0.3.0

发布时间：2026-06-01

这版主要修复一个会影响插件管理判断的问题：如果你在 Obsidian 系统的第三方插件管理界面停用了某个插件，回到 Startup Optimizer 设置页后，它现在会同步显示为停用。

## 这版改变了什么

- 修复系统插件管理界面停用插件后，Startup Optimizer 仍显示为启用的问题。
- 更准确地区分两种状态：
  - 系统里真实启用的插件
  - 被 Startup Optimizer 临时延后加载、但仍属于启动方案的插件
- 启动设置页打开时会同步系统启停状态，避免旧的启动基线把用户手动停用的插件误判为启用。
- 补充逻辑检查，覆盖“旧基线里还有插件，但系统已经停用”的场景。

## 安装

推荐使用 BRAT 安装或更新：

```text
https://github.com/jiaoyingxing/startup-optimizer
```

也可以从本版本 Release Assets 手动下载 `main.js`、`manifest.json`、`styles.css`，放入：

```text
<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/startup-optimizer/
```

请不要使用 GitHub 自动生成的 Source code 压缩包作为安装包。

## 当前边界

Startup Optimizer 0.3.0 仍专注于社区插件的启动时机与启停管理。

它不会优化 Obsidian 核心插件、库加载流程或工作区布局，也不会自动读取 Obsidian 内部启动计时树。
releases.name: Startup Optimizer 0.3.0
